records.question: Which reviewers have given a rating of at least 5 stars to any movie?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT reviewer.rid FROM reviewer
JOIN rating ON reviewer.rid = rating.rid
JOIN movie ON rating.mid = movie.mid
WHERE rating.stars >= 5
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT rID
FROM Rating
WHERE stars >= 5

records.question: Who are the reviewers that gave movies exactly 3 stars?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT reviewer.rid FROM reviewer
JOIN rating ON reviewer.rid = rating.rid
JOIN movie ON rating.mid = movie.mid
WHERE rating.stars = 3
records.pred_sql:
SELECT rID 
FROM Rating 
WHERE stars = 3

records.question: Which reviewers have the name James Cameron?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT reviewer.rid FROM reviewer
WHERE reviewer.name = 'James Cameron'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT rID 
FROM Reviewer 
WHERE name = 'James Cameron'

records.question: Who are the reviewers named Mike Anderson with ratings of at least 3 stars given on or before 2011-01-09?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT reviewer.rid FROM reviewer
JOIN rating ON reviewer.rid = rating.rid
WHERE rating.ratingdate <= '2011-01-09' AND reviewer.name = 'Mike Anderson' AND rating.stars >= 3
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Rating.rID
FROM Rating
INNER JOIN Reviewer ON Rating.rID = Reviewer.rID
WHERE Reviewer.name = 'Mike Anderson'
  AND Rating.stars >= 3
  AND Rating.ratingDate <= '2011-01-09'

records.question: Which reviewers have the name Daniel Lewis and have given ratings?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT reviewer.rid FROM reviewer
JOIN rating ON reviewer.rid = rating.rid
WHERE reviewer.name = 'Daniel Lewis'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT R.rID
FROM Reviewer AS R
JOIN Rating AS Ra ON R.rID = Ra.rID
WHERE R.name = 'Daniel Lewis'

records.question: Who reviewed the movie Avatar directed by James Cameron, released in 2009 or later, gave it at most 5 stars, and whose name is also James Cameron with a rating date on 2011-01-20?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT reviewer.rid FROM reviewer
JOIN rating ON reviewer.rid = rating.rid
JOIN movie ON rating.mid = movie.mid
WHERE movie.director = 'James Cameron' AND reviewer.name = 'James Cameron' AND rating.stars <= 5 AND movie.title = 'Avatar' AND movie.year >= 2009 AND rating.ratingdate = '2011-01-20'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Rating.rID
FROM Rating
INNER JOIN Movie ON Rating.mID = Movie.mID
INNER JOIN Reviewer ON Rating.rID = Reviewer.rID
WHERE Movie.title = 'Avatar'
  AND Movie.director = 'James Cameron'
  AND Movie.year >= 2009
  AND Rating.stars <= 5
  AND Reviewer.name = 'James Cameron'
  AND Rating.ratingDate = '2011-01-20'

FROM Rating AS R
INNER JOIN Movie AS M ON R.mID = M.mID
WHERE M.director = 'Victor Fleming'
